section.title: Golden harness context
section.paragraph: Supporting prose increases the source character count so the expansion guard allows snapshot generation. The section below exercises the converter feature under test for this fixture.

section.title: Code block escaping
section.paragraph: Plain paragraph with enough characters so the fenced code block does not dominate expansion ratio. Additional sentence padding original markdown size for the golden harness fixture.
Another closing paragraph after the code fence.

section.title: Golden harness footer
section.paragraph: Trailing context provides stable surrounding markdown for golden snapshot tests.
Additional padding line one for expansion ratio compliance.
Additional padding line two for expansion ratio compliance.
Additional padding line three for expansion ratio compliance.
